CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion For Exoneration Of Surety
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Weixel, Esq. of the Law Offices of Joseph C. Barton, Tel. 415.775.4455, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel presented the court with copies of Exhibits A and B at the hearing. After reviewing the documents and to the satisfaction of the court, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR EXONERATION OF SURETY, DISCHARGE OF RECEIVER, AND TERMINATION OF RECEIVERSHIP is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Plaintiff'S Motion For Exoneration Of Surety
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Continued To Mar-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jim Weixel, Esq. of the Law Office of Joseph C. Barton, Tel. 415.775.4455, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

This matter is continued to March 19, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Due to clerical error, the matter was not set for hearing. Also, Judge Robertson recuses himself from this case. Plaintiff's counsel to provide notice of the new hearing date no later than March 12, 2013.
